results.title: Anthropic.SDK
results.description: An unofficial C# client for interacting with the Claude AI API, simplifying integration into C# applications and supporting various .NET targets.

results.title: Anthropic SDK for Java
results.description: The Anthropic Java SDK provides convenient access to the Anthropic REST API from applications written in Java.

results.title: Agent Development Kit (ADK)
results.description: An open-source, code-first Python toolkit for building, evaluating, and deploying sophisticated AI agents with flexibility and control, designed to make agent development feel more like software development.

results.title: OpenHands Software Agent SDK
results.description: The OpenHands Software Agent SDK is a Python library designed for building applications with AI agents that write software, featuring a unified API, pre-defined tools, and a REST-based agent server.

results.title: Anthropic SDK TypeScript
results.description: A TypeScript library providing convenient access to the Anthropic REST API for server-side applications, supporting streaming responses, message batches, and tool use.

results.title: Anthropic C# API Library
results.description: The Anthropic C# API Library is an official beta SDK providing convenient access to the Anthropic REST API from C# applications, featuring streaming, error handling, and flexible configuration.

results.title: Anthropic SDK for Python
results.description: The Anthropic Python library provides convenient access to the Anthropic REST API, offering synchronous and asynchronous clients with type definitions for all request parameters and response fields.

results.title: Cognipeer Agent SDK
results.description: A lightweight, message-first agent runtime that provides transparent tool calls, automatic history summarization, planning, multi-agent handoffs, and structured tracing.

results.title: Anthropic SDK Go
results.description: The Anthropic Go library provides convenient access to the Anthropic REST API from applications written in Go.

results.title: ADK Python
results.description: An open-source, code-first Python toolkit for building, evaluating, and deploying sophisticated AI agents with flexibility and control, making agent development feel more like software development.

results.title: Agent Development Kit
results.description: Agent Development Kit (ADK) is a flexible, modular, and open-source framework for developing and deploying AI agents. It simplifies agent creation, orchestration, and deployment across various models and environments, optimized for Gemini and Google ecosystems.

results.title: Agent SDK Go
results.description: An open-source framework for building AI agents with Go, supporting multiple LLM providers, function calling, and agent handoffs.

results.title: Agent Development Kit
results.description: The Agent Development Kit (ADK) is a framework that provides tools, APIs, and components for building, evaluating, and managing AI agents, including features for agent definition, memory, planning, and external tool integration.

results.title: Agent Development Kit
results.description: The Agent Development Kit (ADK) is a flexible framework for building and deploying AI agents, optimized for Gemini and the Google ecosystem, designed to streamline agent development with features like flexible orchestration, multi-agent architecture, and a rich tool ecosystem.

results.title: Agents Python SDK
results.description: Docs for Agents python sdk

results.title: Claude Agent SDK for Python
results.description: A Python SDK that provides functionalities for interacting with Claude Agent, enabling querying, custom tools, hooks, and managing bidirectional, interactive conversations.

results.title: Claude Agent SDK
results.description: The Claude Agent SDK enables programmatic building of AI agents with Claude Code's capabilities, allowing them to understand codebases, edit files, run commands, and execute complex workflows.

results.title: Anthropic Ruby SDK
results.description: The Anthropic Ruby library provides convenient access to the Anthropic REST API from any Ruby 3.2.0+ application, supporting features like streaming responses and file uploads.

results.title: Anthropic Go API Library
results.description: Anthropic Go SDK provides convenient, typed access to the Anthropic REST API for Go applications, including messaging, streaming, tool-calling, and utilities for request/response modeling and omitzero JSON semantics.

results.title: Agent Development Kit Samples
results.description: This repository provides ready-to-use agents built on the Agent Development Kit (ADK) for Python and Java, designed to accelerate agent development with various use cases.

results.title: A2A SDK Python
results.description: The A2A SDK Python provides client and server components for interacting with the A2A (Agent-to-Agent) communication protocol, enabling messaging, task management, and agent execution.

results.title: AI SDK (llmstxt)
results.description: Learn how to build a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) agent using the AI SDK and Next.js, enabling LLMs to access and utilize external information.

results.title: AI SDK Agents
results.description: AI SDK Agents offers full-stack, production-ready patterns for building agents, workflows, and tool calling using Vercel AI SDK v6 and Shadcn/ui.

results.title: Agent Network Protocol Open SDK
results.description: an open sdk for developer to implement anp protocol fast an easy

results.title: Anthropic Quickstarts
results.description: A collection of projects designed to help developers quickly get started building applications using the Anthropic API, featuring examples like customer support agents and financial data analysts.

results.title: Agentuity SDK
results.description: The Agentuity TypeScript SDK is a toolkit for building, deploying, and managing AI agents in Node.js and Bun, enabling multi-agent architectures, event-driven design, and rich content handling.

results.title: Symbiont Python SDK
results.description: A Python SDK for interacting with the Symbiont Agent Runtime System, providing a streamlined interface for building AI-powered applications with agent capabilities, tool review workflows, and security analysis.

results.title: Agentica
results.description: Agentica is an AI function calling framework that simplifies AI agent development by allowing you to define agents using TypeScript classes, Swagger/OpenAPI documents, or MCP servers.

results.title: Agent Development Kit (ADK)
results.description: The Agent Development Kit (ADK) is a Go library for building AI agents compatible with the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol, enabling interoperable communication and task delegation between AI agents.

results.title: Agent Development Kit
results.description: An open-source, code-first toolkit for building, evaluating, and deploying sophisticated AI agents with flexibility and control, designed for compatibility with other frameworks.
